_shorthelp: Input is an input field for text, numbers and other data types. Bootstrap.

_step.desc: A value the input has to be a multiple of. Use 1 for integer only

_min.desc: For inputType Number, the minimum value. For date, the earliest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_max.desc: For inputType Number, the maximum value. For date, the latest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_leftText.desc: Text to put to the left of the input area. Does not display in containers less than 768 px wide.

_headerCols.desc: Columns for header. headerCols + valueCols should add up to 12.

_valueCols.desc: Columns for header. headerCols + valueCols should add up to 12.

_size-lg.desc: Size of column in large layout. Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_htmltemplate: "<input id='{id}_contents' type='{inputType}'{if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if} {_bsTextatr!i}{if min<>''} min='{min}'{/if}{if max<>''} max='{max}' {/if}{if step<>''}step={step} {/if}  style='{_paddingcss!i}{_colorscss!i}{_bsTextcss!i}' class='{if inputType<>'file'}form-control {size} {/if}{class}' {if value<>''}value='{value!b}' {/if}>",
